programme.title: Space Jam
programme.desc: Michael Jordan and Bugs Bunny team up in an outer space basketball match to save kidnapped Looney Tunes characters.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Gye-choon and her lost grandaughter Hye-ji reunited after 12 years, yet Hye-ji's strange behaviour raise questions on what happened to her while they were apart.

programme.title: Love, Lies
programme.desc: A gisaeng is consumed by jealousy after her friend finds success as a pop singer and her lover falls for her. Feeling betrayed, things begin to fall apart as she tries to regain the things she lost.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Seoul falls into chaos as a devil-worshipping cult summons an ancient demon Asmodeus. “Holy Night”, the demon-hunting trio, unleash their power to battle against the cult enforcers and the demon in order to save a possessed girl from Asmodeus.

programme.title: Mr. Zoo: The Missing Vip
programme.desc: After discovering he can suddenly talk to animals, an intelligence agent partners with a canine pal to handle a case that has gone sideways.

programme.title: Innocence
programme.desc: A hotshot lawyer uncovers the conspiracy of a small village while defending her estranged mother, who has Alzheimer's disease and accused of killing the attendees at her husband’s funeral.

programme.title: Mal-Mo-E: The Secret Mission
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation in the 1940s, two men work together to secretly create a dictionary of the Korean language when the language was banned.

programme.title: Prison Chaos
programme.desc: Prison is a hell where only the strong survive. Under Hwang's reign, the peace in prison can be maintained. The newcomer Han breaks the peace and reveals the hidden secrets there...

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Cheer Up, Mr. Lee!

programme.title: New World

programme.title: Behind the Shadows
programme.desc: Yun-ho, born weak and destined to die young, is drawn to his loyal friend, Jae-un. In the conservative Joseon Dynasty, Yun-ho disguises as a girl to confess his love to Jae-un before his arranged marriage.

programme.title: Punch-Drunk Love
programme.desc: Bok-seo gave up to be a soccer player after an injury. He meets Bok-hee and falls in love with her. Bok-hee feels unsure but she appreciates his sincerity, leading to something special...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must finally overcome their differences and come together as a team to survive the Dark Realm.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom attempts to defeat the World Serpent by emulating Hiccup.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition: "The War of the Cheeks", a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day. When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The world’s worst baby is on the loose and Boss Baby, Tim and the team must find him before he turns the whole neighborhood against babies

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Meet Ty Rux and his buddy Revvit as they join forces with the giant Dinotrux team that are half dinosaur, half construction truck and full-on fun!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When Revvit and his Reptool friends venture out of their ravine, the Dinotrux band together to save them from a flock of savage Scrapadactyls.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper unknowingly drops her cooking camp application on the way to post office, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it into that big blue mailbox. / When Cassie accidentally places Lola's beloved, old toy wand in a box marked for a giveaway drive in the park, the Dew Drops must find a way to retrieve the wand before it ends up in the hands of an entirely new family.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it’s up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus’ pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Mr. Tanaka adopts an unruly dog at Sam’s behest, the Zenkos have the job of training the mischievous mutt and turning him into man’s best friend material. / When Ellie's friend Maria is late submitting her painting to the art show, it’s up to the Zenkos to get inside the community center after hours, avoiding overzealous junior security Rodney, and get Maria’s painting on display before the show starts.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman accidentally create a Black Hole after skipping their chores; Winston Churchill runs away to hide in a baby nursery to avoid work.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman brings back a giant man baby after he loses a neighbor's son in the WABAC; Blackbeard battles a bully pirate to get his mojo and beard back

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero – but being “brave” quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: The Golem, a giant clay enemy Puss has been outrunning for years, comes to San Lorenzo. With Artephius' help, Puss may be able to defeat his foe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: GBRB: Farm Operation - Go Go Farm
programme.desc: The ultimate bestie trio Lee Kwang-soo, Kim Woo-bin, and Doh Kyung-soo head to Jeju Island for a "farm-tastic" new farm stay adventure.

programme.title: World of Street Woman Fighter
programme.desc: The <Street Woman Fighter> series make a triumphant return on a global stage! 6 dance crews from different countries set to compete in an upgraded match to win the title of International Champion!

programme.title: Undercover Chef - Korea
programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: Yumi's Cells 3
programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: Mr. Eo's Food World Tour
programme.desc: Ryu Soo-young, Yoon Kyung-ho and Kihyun set out into the unknown for new recipes, cooking up one-of-a-kind dishes along the way.

programme.title: Rented in Finland
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Kill It: Style Creator Showdown
programme.desc: 100 women compete in this high-stakes survival show to become the next global K-fashion icon.

programme.title: GBRB: Farm Operation - Go Go Farm
programme.desc: The ultimate bestie trio Lee Kwang-soo, Kim Woo-bin, and Doh Kyung-soo head to Jeju Island for a "farm-tastic" new farm stay adventure.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by human traffickers.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengeance for the death of his teacher

programme.title: Project Silence
programme.desc: Silence takes place when an accident occurs on a foggy bridge and, as a result, an unknown beast is unleashed.

programme.title: Outbreak
programme.desc: A Psychological Thriller about a state park ranger husband and his wife struggling to come to terms with their missing teenage son while dealing with a local mystery that questions their relationship and in the end, their grip on reality.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: An MMA champion finds himself trapped in a prison in Thailand and is freedom depends on defeating a 400-pound killer in an underground match.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady.

programme.title: Glorious Days
programme.desc: A group of five girls and one boy becomes Highschool best friends since high school. 23 years later, one of them lay dying in a hospital. She hopes she could see all five of her old friends for the last time.

programme.title: Isabelle
programme.desc: A young couple's dream of starting a family shatters as they descend into the depths of paranoia and must struggle to survive an evil presence that wants nothing more than their very own lives.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York detectives head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Framed for a terrorist bombing, a foreign service officer must dodge a top assassin, while racing against time to thwart a deadly plot.

programme.title: The Hunter'S Prayer
programme.desc: An assassin is sent to kill a young woman but finds himself unable to pull the trigger. They form an uneasy alliance and flee from their pursuers.

programme.title: Bride for Rent
programme.desc: Adaptation of Philippine movie, Bride for Rent. Two unknown people decided to work together for a fake wedding to get the money they wanted.

programme.title: The Policeman'S Lineage
programme.desc: A criminal drama of the very different two policemen handling a huge case together shakes the police organization.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born To Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born To Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life On Earth
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: With over 50 years in the industry, not many filmmakers can boast the longevity and influence of Steven Spielberg, whose journey from the suburbs of Arizona to the spotlight of Hollywood is one of the greatest stories ever told.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: 60 years since his directorial debut, Martin Scorsese's life has been dedicated to the past, present and future of cinema. Named Caretaker of Cinema, Martin Scorsese continues to push the boundaries of moviemaking.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore animal communication and reveal the incredible adaptations that enable animals to ‘talk’ to each other.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Examining nature’s most sociable animals, unveiling the surprising and incredible behaviours that have evolved in response to cohabitation.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Showcasing some of nature’s most incredible animal minds, whose brains demonstrate high intelligence, enabling them to gain advantage of their competition.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: As Manu heads past his halfway mark on his journey around the world, he heads to Tokyo to explore the bustling city. It is a massive challenge and he is having the time of his life but how is that budget going?

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: Building The Impossible
programme.desc: Travelling to the North of Scotland, Rob discovers the story of the British Oil Industry though it’s incredible engineering; from first oil to today’s innovative rigs.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how ad campaigns from the '50s launched new American traditions and the promise of a bright tomorrow.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: Ainsley Eats The Streets
programme.desc: Ainsley lands in Morocco, but he doesn't go to Marrakesch or Casablanca, but to the colourful, chaotic and dreamy city of Fes. The sprawling medina is a World Heritage site and a gateway to another time.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must finally overcome their differences and come together as a team to survive the Dark Realm.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom attempts to defeat the World Serpent by emulating Hiccup.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition: "The War of the Cheeks", a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day. When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The world’s worst baby is on the loose and Boss Baby, Tim and the team must find him before he turns the whole neighborhood against babies

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Meet Ty Rux and his buddy Revvit as they join forces with the giant Dinotrux team that are half dinosaur, half construction truck and full-on fun!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When Revvit and his Reptool friends venture out of their ravine, the Dinotrux band together to save them from a flock of savage Scrapadactyls.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: When White Shadow is invited to play a daring sport against his hero, an athletic dung beetle, the crew is worried he doesn't know the game is fixed. // Chet gets taken by a con artist gecko and bets Turbo's shell. When Turbo is challenged, he must go slow to try to beat the gecko at his own game.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper unknowingly drops her cooking camp application on the way to post office, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it into that big blue mailbox. / When Cassie accidentally places Lola's beloved, old toy wand in a box marked for a giveaway drive in the park, the Dew Drops must find a way to retrieve the wand before it ends up in the hands of an entirely new family.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it’s up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus’ pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Mr. Tanaka adopts an unruly dog at Sam’s behest, the Zenkos have the job of training the mischievous mutt and turning him into man’s best friend material. / When Ellie's friend Maria is late submitting her painting to the art show, it’s up to the Zenkos to get inside the community center after hours, avoiding overzealous junior security Rodney, and get Maria’s painting on display before the show starts.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman accidentally create a Black Hole after skipping their chores; Winston Churchill runs away to hide in a baby nursery to avoid work.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman brings back a giant man baby after he loses a neighbor's son in the WABAC; Blackbeard battles a bully pirate to get his mojo and beard back

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero – but being “brave” quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: The Golem, a giant clay enemy Puss has been outrunning for years, comes to San Lorenzo. With Artephius' help, Puss may be able to defeat his foe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs run into their old rivals the BUDs on the first day of classes, prompting Lucky to run for class rep. Elsewhere, Abigail helps solve a mystery.

programme.desc: The Dragon riders enlist the aid of Carla and Hazel and their scientific knowledge to help them prepare for a mission to neutralize Jörmungandr so they can return him to his chamber and seal him back inside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Meteor Part 1
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he’d want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Final Approach Part 1

programme.desc: A woman bites another driver. A young woman takes evasive manoeuvres to survive a road-raging driver. Motorists fight in a drive-thru.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: Good Samaritans rescue road rage victims. Californians negotiate dangerous roadways. A man defends his child from a gun-toting menace.

programme.title: Who Killed Billy The Kid: A Mysteries At The Museum Special
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores the legend of Billy the Kid to uncover the truth surrounding his death.

programme.desc: It concentrates on the latest news and social changes happening in china and all over the world

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Inspired by New Zealand chef Vaughan Mabee’s ‘snacks’, contestants have two hours to create a spectacular 'one bite' wonder that represents who they are to keep them safe from elimination.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how to make your own takeout at home and how to stock your pantry for today's recipe, chicken chow fun, a Chinese-American favourite with a rice-noodle base and vegetables.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: If you're hungry for excitement, this episode will certainly satisfy the most ravenous appetite for adventure. Join host Michael Yo for a wild desert horse-ride to a delicious dinner.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar's got a steal of a deal in Port Richey. But after they pull up to this 90s Era Time capsule, they discover that vandals, roaches, and water damage have had their way with the interior.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat To My Family
programme.desc: When Ryan's sister, Serena, escapes from a dangerous cult, she seeks refuge with his family to rebuild her life. Ryan's wife, Marielle, is suspicious of Serena and doesn't believe she's truly reformed.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: The Caputos are briefly all under the same roof for the first time in weeks. Theresa visits her cousins in Rehoboth Beach for an impromptu vacation in between tour stops.

programme.title: Woman with the Red Lipstick
programme.desc: Looking to spice things up, Lucy and her boyfriend assume fake names and role-play meeting for the first time. Days later, Lucy sees a news report about a missing person with the same name she just used.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing. Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee in helping Ryan, whose numerous head bumps undermine his life journey.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sautéed greens.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat To My Family
programme.desc: When Ryan's sister, Serena, escapes from a dangerous cult, she seeks refuge with his family to rebuild her life. Ryan's wife, Marielle, is suspicious of Serena and doesn't believe she's truly reformed.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The Top 4 contestants compete for a chance to win $10,000 in travel vouchers, after each picking a mystery ingredient inspired by the judge’s personal travel adventures.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's an all in elimination and no wants to go home. There are four contestants and only three spots in the coveted Semi Final.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Today, the final three contestants take part in a classic MasterChef challenge, the Time Auction. Beginning with 120 minutes, they will bid for their ingredients using time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot (S1)
programme.desc: After only nine months of dating, a Canadian power couple is ready to find a love nest and build a business in Tulum, Mexico.

programme.title: Building Roots (S1)
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi help a retired firefighter discover a peaceful life by infusing personality and elevated style into his modern mountain retreat.

programme.title: House Hunters (S2)
programme.desc: After years of living in Las Vegas, a couple longs to return home and find a lake side place in Slidell, Louisiana.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop (S5)
programme.desc: A house on a busy street goes from unkempt to unbelievable in Garden Grove, CA.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home (S3)
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a woman gives her son her old condo in Ponte Verde Beach, FL, and seeks a home big enough for her and her hobbies.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: Anthony begins with the Yangtze River, down a diversion along the Grand Canal towards Suzhou, and finally to Wuxi.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world, there are places and objects that are thought to be cursed. Many people avoid these things, believing they will bring harm. Others think that curses are nothing but superstition.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As gator season enters the homestretch, Troy and Pickle chase a hook-breaking monster. Ashley uses a tip from the King of the Swamp to target a giant. Bruce puts it all on the line on his final day.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotised assassins, and a brain-linked cyborg couple. We investigate some of the strangest experiments on record. From two-headed dogs to testicle transplants...

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: While digging a massive steel shaft in the Money Pit area, the Lagina brothers and their team make a discovery that could help prove the legends about buried treasure to be true.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Marty withstands a brutal cold snap to harvest the last of his furs and fly home to his family; Mike carves a narrow road out of a steep ridge near his property to gain access to prime hunting grounds.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: The White-Browed Priest supports the brutal Qing government, burning down Shaolin Temple and hunting its disciples. Shaolin’s Hung falls in love with Fang while escaping the hunt and the couple have a son before Hung is killed by the Priest. To avenge his father, Hung’s son creates a new form of martial art combining his parents’ kung fu styles.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house’s owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Pass and Goal
programme.desc: After losing everything, a businesswoman starts over in Sham Shui Po, forming a kids’ football team to take on an elite squad. As she rebuilds her life, she inspires her players to believe in themselves and fight against the odds. Together, they strive to rewrite their first half with a second chance at victory and hope.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian’s rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian’s granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Amid the recession caused by the pandemic, debt-ridden wedding planner, Sheng, finds a lifeline as he transitions into a funeral planner. His unconventional approach leads to unexpected success, and his attitude toward his career and life is transformed after being inspired by the respected Master Wen.

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government’s secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor’s ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam’s empire.

programme.title: Lost Love
programme.desc: Mei tries to get over the death of her young son by becoming a foster parent. For 13 years, Mei’s dedication to the foster child leads her to neglect her husband and the true needs of the child. It is only through the child’s unintentional help that the couple finally manages to salvage their relationship.

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: A series of murders at a munitions factory sparks fear of a “Phantom Bullet” that kills without a trace. Detective Song Dong Lu and sharpshooter Guo Zhui are tasked with solving the case. As they uncover layers of corruption and conspiracy, they are drawn into a deadly game where the truth is more dangerous than the bullets.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: Be earthquake-ready! Learn survival tips for quakes and when you're trapped under rubble. You'll want to watch this before your next trip to Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Oku-Izumo is home to an ancient technique for making the steel used in Japanese swords. We meet a blacksmith who has inherited the tradition, and enjoy local scenery presented in time-lapse images.

programme.title: NewsRoom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Niizawa Iwao has won first place for four straight years in two globally influential sake awards. He talks about brewing sake that serves as a supporting player to make meals taste even better.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: National Parks of Japan:Daisen-Oki
programme.desc: Daisen-Oki National Park comprises the Oki Islands, which boast spectacular geological formations, and a mainland area with shrines and sacred mountains that gave rise to myths and legends.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life:Sacred Cranes

programme.title: Smallville S2 2
programme.desc: Clark goes into hiding after he discovers his startling new power that quickly gets out of control and almost harms Lana.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 11
programme.desc: At Michael's fireworks stand, he's got everything from exploding fruit to levitation sparklers. And at a Hemp store, Michael shows off his innovations in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule completely blows one man's mind!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 12
programme.desc: Michael tries new foods like shape-shifting pasta and never-ending soup! Then it's off to a vinyl shop for a record-breaking illusion, and later, Michael tries to convince his coworker to explore a new plant.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 1
programme.desc: On the eighth season premiere, Leonard and Amy take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny interviews for a job at Bernadette's company.

programme.title: Friends S7 4
programme.desc: Rachel wants to hire a cute, young male assistant over a more qualified woman. Joey's show gets cancelled. Chandler, Monica and Ross tell embarrassing secrets about one another.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 06
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo, and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: The chase is on. Academy Award nominee Ethan Hawke (Training Day) stars in this gritty, high-octane action thriller alongside actress/music sensation Selena Gomez and Oscar winner Jon Voight (Coming Home). Hawke stars as a former racecar driver, working against the clock and forced into a dangerous mission behind the wheel. Desperately trying to save the life of his kidnapped wife, he commandeers a fast car and its unwitting owner (Gomez), taking them on a high-speed race against time at the command of the unseen mysterious assailant (Voight) holding his wife hostage and watching his every move. To save his wife, he took the job. To keep her alive, he'll take control.

programme.title: Inkheart
programme.desc: What if every time you read aloud, the story came to life? Based on Cornelia Funke's bestselling children's novel, this timeless tale of imagination and adventure centers on a young girl whose father (The Mummy's Brendan Fraser) has a secret ability to bring characters from books to life when he reads them aloud. But when a ruthless villain (The Lord of the Rings' Andy Serkis) from a rare children's fable kidnaps Meggie's father to bring others out of the boundaries of fiction, she and a disparate group of friends both real and magic embark on the kind of adventure she has only read about in books to save him and set things right. Also starring The Da Vinci Code's Paul Bettany and Oscar winners Helen Mirren and Jim Broadbent, 'Inkheart' makes all the mystery, all the danger, and all the adventure jump off the page!

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 16

programme.title: Container Wars S3 10

programme.title: Container Wars S3 11
programme.desc: When jumbo-sized containers make their way to the yard, buyers use every trick in the book to win, big time. A bin full of outdoor BBQs could send two bidders up in flames, while a 'ready-to-go' rave unit sounds like music to the Israeli's ears. Plus, Mo and Ty feel the need for speed, but will their huge bet pay off?

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: Short Cuts
programme.desc: Inspiring topics and positive initiatives from around the world that are driving meaningful change, empowering communities, fostering innovation, and creating a brighter, more hopeful future for people and the planet alike

programme.title: The World

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent Linton Besser brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: ABC Late News
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Above Tasmania's breathtaking Huon River, Dan Rawlins must overcome personal tragedy, and his own lack of building experience, to almost singlehandedly construct an off-grid home, made of hemp.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: In Mooloolaba, Halina boards a 100-year-old ketch to join an Indigenous-owned eco tour company. In Rockhampton, Kristy meets two start-up entrepreneurs working with mastectomy clothing. Plus Craig gets into a seafood smokery.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent Linton Besser brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Compass
programme.desc: Georgina Banks travels to Bangka in Indonesia to uncover what happened to her great aunt, one of the 21 Australian WW2 nurses massacred there. New voices highlight the silencing of women's stories in our military history.

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: Emma Rebellato and Catherine Murphy bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, plus sport and Lillian Rangiah with your weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. Melissa Mackay brings you the day's top stories and the latest news, with live crosses to reporters and guests plus sport with Catherine Murphy and weather with Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Ambulance Australia follows the state's Ambulance Services from the Triple Zero Control Centres to paramedics on the road.

programme.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programme.desc: Terra Nullius: law or lie? Eddie Mabo and others challenge the legal fiction at the heart of colonisation and transform Australia's understanding of land and sovereignty.

programme.title: Wang Gungwu Lecture 2026
programme.desc: Professor Kelvin Kong delivers the 2026 Wang Gungwu Lecture. Each year the lecture celebrates the life and work of a prominent Chinese Australian.

programme.title: National Press Club Address
programme.desc: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision-makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Astrophysicist Kirsten Banks and Yerrabingin's Christian Hampson join NAIDOC Week host Nornie Bero to cook food with a native twist.

programme.title: Fancy Fruit
programme.desc: Australia produces top quality fruit but high supermarket standards can mean even slightly less than perfect produce goes to waste. But one couple is finding new markets, by drying the fruit.
